keyMappings:
map <C-d> scrollPageDown
map <C-u> scrollPageUp

#map o Vomnibar.activate
#map f LinkHints.activateMode
#map j scrollDown
#map k scrollUp


map <C-t> createTab https://start.duckduckgo.com
map <C-x> removeTab
map J nextTab
map K previousTab
#map <C-l> nextTab
#map <C-h> previousTab
map H goBack
map L goForward
